name: feature.podcasts.nodes
description: Multi-speaker podcast generation pipeline (ADR 0086) — workflow nodes that compose existing seams into the `podcasts.generate` built-in workflow. `select-content` grounds on a notebook's sources via ctx.features.notebooks; `outline` and `transcript` draft the script with ctx.callAI and persist versioned Documents (ctx.features.documents); `synthesize` voices each dialogue turn via ctx.callSpeechSynthesizer (RFC 0105) into per-turn audio clips; `mix` assembles the ordered clip list onto the episode (ctx.features.podcasts.recordEpisodeResult). The only run input is episodeId — each node resolves the episode/episodeProfile/speakerProfile config authoritatively from ctx.features.podcasts. Action nodes — outputs are recorded; replay/fork read the recorded result rather than re-calling the model/synthesizer.
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: Podcast Select Content
nodes.description: Grounds the episode on its notebook's sources/notes via ctx.features.notebooks.ask (honors per-source context levels). Inputs: { episodeId }. Output: { context } — the augmented prompt fed to the outline node. Degrades to the episode briefing when notebooks isn't composed.

nodes.label: Podcast Outline
nodes.description: Drafts a segmented episode outline via ctx.callAI (outlineModel from the EpisodeProfile) and persists it as a Document owned by the notebook subject (ctx.features.documents). Inputs: { episodeId } + { context } (edge). Output: { outline }. Records outlineDocRef on the episode.

nodes.label: Podcast Transcript
nodes.description: Scripts a multi-speaker dialogue (1–4 speakers, each with persona + voice) via ctx.callAI (transcriptModel) as a JSON array of turns, and persists a readable transcript Document. Inputs: { episodeId } + { outline } (edge). Output: { turns } — [{speaker,text}] fed to synthesize. Records transcriptDocRef.

nodes.label: Podcast Synthesize (TTS)
nodes.description: Voices each dialogue turn via ctx.callSpeechSynthesizer (RFC 0105), one call per turn carrying that speaker's opaque voiceId. Inputs: { episodeId } + { turns } (edge). Output: { clips } — ordered [{speaker,voiceId,url,mimeType}] (each turn's bytes are already stored as a tenant-scoped Media asset by the synth host impl).

nodes.label: Podcast Mix
nodes.description: Assembles the ordered clip list onto the episode tracking record via ctx.features.podcasts.recordEpisodeResult (the Studio player plays the clips sequentially — the v1 mix; a single-file server-side mux is the deferred render option, ADR 0086 OQ-1). Inputs: { episodeId } + { clips } (edge). Output: { clipCount }.
